app.title: Autai

splitView.label: Split View
splitView.tooltip: View webpages alongside chat in research and browser use modes
sidebar.archiveAllDesc: This will archive all conversations. You can find them in Archive.
sidebar.deleteAllDesc: This will permanently delete all conversations — they can't be recovered. You can archive them instead.
sidebar.deleteAllArchivedDesc: This will permanently delete all archived conversations — they can't be recovered.
sidebar.restoreAllDesc: This will restore all archived conversations back to your list.

composer.browser.mode.planned.descriptio: AI creates a step-by-step plan for your approval first.

entertainment.wizard.title: Start Reading
entertainment.wizard.subtitle: Choose how to process your novel, then point us at it.
entertainment.wizard.step.0.title: Mode
entertainment.wizard.step.1.title: Novel
entertainment.wizard.step.2.title: Options
entertainment.wizard.mode.dehydrate.desc: Strip filler, fix prose, and intensify a web novel for cleaner reading.
entertainment.wizard.mode.interactive.de: Turn a novel into human-in-the-loop interactive fiction.
entertainment.wizard.novel.file.label: Attach a text file
entertainment.wizard.novel.internet.sour: Where to find it — a URL or a search hint (hover the help icon for details)
Tell us where to read the novel: a URL, a search instruction, or other guidance. The novel must be readable on a webpage — NOT a downloadable PDF or TXT.
Must be a readable webpage, not a downloadable PDF/TXT.
entertainment.wizard.options.dehydrate.b: AI acts as a strict editor: catches typos, grammar, and awkward phrasing, and normalizes punctuation (fills missing quotes, fixes mixed CJK/Latin marks) for smooth reading.
Identifies and replaces clichéd web-novel tropes and overused memes (e.g. 恐怖如斯, 倒吸一口凉气) to strip the greasy feel and restore clarity.
Removes the author's forced worldbuilding lectures and preachy passages — especially setting-dumps disguised as the protagonist's inner monologue — turning exposition into immersion.
